title: Waine Pryce
extract: Waine Pryce (born (1981-10-03)3 October 1981) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a winger and also as a centre in the 2000s and 2010s. He played at international level for England 'A' and Jamaica, and at club level for the Castleford Tigers, Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, Featherstone Rovers, Hunslet Hawks (two spells) and the York City Knights.
